title: fix(apps): rename Wikimind to Wikimind AI
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Author request from #11704:

- Renames **Wikimind** → **Wikimind AI**
- Updates description to "Wikimind AI is a French chatbot with over 29 functional AI models."
- Regenerates `GREENHOUSE.md` + `README.md` via `app-update-greenhouse.js`

Fixes #11704

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Bonjour, Wikimind AI
gist.blurb: The community app Wikimind has officially leveled up to Wikimind AI. Say bonjour to this French chatbot packing over 29 functional AI models!
gist.summary: Renamed the community app Wikimind to Wikimind AI and updated its description to highlight its 29+ functional AI models.
gist.impact: Users browsing the app showcase will now see Wikimind AI with its updated branding and capabilities.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny French beret, interacting with a retro computer in a cozy cafe setting to represent the French chatbot app update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny red French beret, sitting at a retro computer terminal in a cozy digital cafe. The monitor glows with a chunky pixel brain and the number 29. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
